title: Logo lockup
lede: Lockups govern how the KIMES logo combines with sub-brands and external partners. Always preserve hierarchy, alignment, and clear space. Use only approved lockup patterns — do not invent new combinations.

internal.title: 07.1 — KIMES + sub-brands
internal.desc: Three approved patterns for combining KIMES with its three sub-brands. X = the cap-height of the "K" in the KIMES wordmark within the lockup.

external.title: 07.2 — KIMES + external partner
external.desc: Three approved patterns for combining KIMES with sponsor or partner logos. Partner logos are shown here as neutral placeholders.

rules.title: 07.3 — Spacing & alignment rules
rules.desc: X = the cap-height of capital "K" in the KIMES wordmark within the lockup. All measurements scale relative to it.

donts.title: 07.4 — Don'ts
donts.desc: Eight common mistakes when combining logos. None of these are approved — request a corrected lockup from the brand team.

approval.ko: 외부 파트너 로고 결합 시에는 반드시 KIMES 브랜드팀의 사전 승인이 필요합니다.
approval.en: External partner lockups require prior approval from the KIMES brand team.
